summary: First-run full-stack test of AgriFlow WashOps. Ran 17 backend pytest cases (100% pass) covering auth, sensors, control, sessions, AI vision (Gemini 2.5 Flash via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY), notifications and auto-mode safety-stop. Ran Playwright e2e covering login, register fallback, dashboard controls (motor slider, nozzle, auto-mode, servo, threshold dialog), session start/stop, camera upload + AI analysis, History, ESP32 code, Settings, logout. All critical flows work.

minor.issue: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); should migrate to lifespan context manager in FastAPI >=0.109
No range validation on motor_speed (0-100), threshold_turbidity, pH bounds. Caller can send negative or absurd values
Auto-stop send_push_to_user is awaited inside hot path with no error guard beyond pywebpush; fine for now

integration_issues.issue: After creating a session via dashboard start/stop, /history page shows 'no-sessions' empty state (likely data fetch timing / possibly missing refetch on nav). Needs verification - could be a stale-cache effect; session was successfully created and visible via GET /api/sessions in backend test.

action_items: Verify History page refetches sessions on mount (investigate Indonesia-locale emptiness after a completed session)
Add input validation (Pydantic Field constraints) on ControlUpdate fields
Migrate FastAPI startup/shutdown event handlers to lifespan context manager
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single ~495 line file - acceptable but close to limit; splitting into routers/auth.py, routers/sensors.py, routers/ai.py would help maintainability
JWT_SECRET has a fallback dev secret - should fail fast (raise) in production env
EMERGENT_LLM_KEY check returns 500 only when missing; good. AI response JSON parse has sensible fallback (cleanliness_score=70). Works end-to-end with Gemini 2.5 Flash.
Simulator runs globally with a shared task - fine for single-replica; document that scaling horizontally would duplicate data
All routes correctly use /api prefix, CORS configured, MongoDB ObjectId excluded via {_id: 0} projections - good
test_credentials: test@agriflow.com / test123 (existing test user works). /app/memory/test_credentials.md is empty - main agent may want to populate it.
seed_data_creation: Created transient test user tester_<uuid>@agriflow.io during pytest run (not cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_agriflow.py passes all 17 cases including AI vision and auto-stop. Frontend Playwright smoke works end-to-end. Only minor note: after completing a session via dashboard, /history grid occasionally renders empty on first nav; likely a fetch-timing or missing useEffect dependency. Use same credentials test@agriflow.com / test123.
rca of the issue: N/A - no critical issues. History empty-state concern is minor and unconfirmed; could be fetch run before navigation settles.
